title: 2025-2026 Akademik Yılı Erasmus+ Başvuruları Başladı!
content:
Hayallerini Erteleme!

"turnaportal.ua.gov.tr"

---

Don't postpone your dreams! ✈️ Applications for the 2025-2026 Academic Year Erasmus+ Programs Have Started! As the first step to initiate your application process, you must submit your application via 'turnaportal.ua.gov.tr'.
